homepage.loadingProgressAria: Loading homepage hero 3D model, {{percent}} percent complete.

footnotes.a: 7+ Years of Proven Reliability. Beyond distributing robotic arms, we provide years of accumulated technical expertise. Every R-Series cobot undergoes a "Zero-Defect" quality control process before leaving the facility, ensuring peak performance right out of the box.

Always Connected, 24/7. Our expert team is available across time zones to provide technical consultation. Whether it's a business inquiry or complex technical support, we guarantee a professional response within 12 hours.

Efficiency in Motion. Standard specifications are scheduled for shipment within 3-5 business days after payment confirmation. For large-scale deployments or bespoke orders, delivery timelines are precisely defined in the sales contract.

Accuracy in Every Millimeter. Our repeatability of ±0.02mm is measured under strictly controlled laboratory conditions. We provide performance evaluations tailored to your specific payload, speed, and environmental requirements.

Tailored to Your Ambition (OEM/ODM). We turn your vision into reality. Beyond our standard R-Series, we offer deep enterprise-level customization, brand integration, and collaborative development of industry-specific end-effectors.

Your Production, Protected. Core drive systems (motors, reducers) and control architectures are covered by a 2-year limited warranty. With our global response mechanism, we ensure your production line remains efficient and worry-free.

Global Standards, Local Trust. All R-Series products comply with international RoHS environmental standards and have obtained EU CE safety certification and ISO9001 quality management system certification. We advocate for sustainable manufacturing.

r_core.metaDescription: r-Series r-Core cobot platform: 4kg nominal (5kg peak) payload, 922mm reach, ±0.05mm repeatability, and a base-integrated controller for compact production and lab cells.
r_core.immersive_glb_alt: Roooll r-Core integrated collaborative robot cobot for immersive product page; 6-axis collaborative robotic arm with integrated control for precision assembly and lab automation.

scenario_subnav.brand_top_aria: Roooll brand strip on r-Core immersive page
scenario_subnav.slogan: From blueprint to bench — roll into your next cell.

cards.title: Flange Head L6_flange
cards.description: High-precision flange for quick tool switching.

cards.title: Base Module
cards.description: Low-center base improves stability and damping.

cards.title: Middle Joint J3
cards.description: Core load-bearing joint for smooth pathing.

cards.title: Wrist J5/J6
cards.description: Fine attitude control for tight workspaces.

scroll_film.section_aria: Immersive r-Core cobot story: advantages, detail views, blueprint, and applications

advantages.kicker: Deployment should feel like plugging something in.
advantages.title: Plug. Teach. Go.
advantages.body: {{description}}. Keep calibration at the factory; keep your floor simple—power, connect, and start lead-through with the Web App, a 10.1" pendant, or a mobile terminal. Fewer pages in the binder, more shifts in production.

advantages.kicker: Built on Faoro-class FR cobot control heritage—precision you can explain in a stand-up.
advantages.title: Precision you can cite
advantages.body: Under controlled payload and motion, {{repeatability}} repeatability and {{payload}} nominal payload give inspection and assembly a number to stand on—not a hunch. Cobot traceability starts when the arm can tell the same story shift after shift.

advantages.title: Brain in the base
advantages.body: About {{weight}} total mass and a compact base let this collaborative robotic arm sit closer to people—lines, labs, and mobile medical carts gain a little floor back and a little breathing room for safety.

flange.title: Flange: where tooling meets the process
flange.body: A precision end flange gives fixtures, quick changers, and process modules a stable handshake—one less re-teach per changeover.

base.title: Base: low center, integrated "heart"
base.body: Controller and structure as one improve damping and rigidity, with fewer cables and cleaner installs—ideal for compact cobot cells and mobile platforms.

scroll_film.svg_caption: The official vector technical drawing wipes in as you scroll—envelope, joint relationships, and integration cues for mechanical and controls teams to align fast.
scroll_film.scenario_caption: From drawing to duty: r-Core cobot arms in manufacturing, lab automation, and medical-assist workcells.
scroll_film.scenario_image_alt: r-Core collaborative robot cobot product scene, showing integrated collaborative robotic arm form factor in a typical deployment.

flange_strip.title: Alloy-tough build.
flange_strip.body: Die-cast and extruded aluminum alloys—validated across millions of motion cycles—keep links stiff when payloads spike and floor temps swing.

flange_strip.title: 2-year confidence.
flange_strip.body: Core drives, gearing, and control electronics are covered where it matters—less downtime drama, more predictable throughput across shifts.

flange_strip.title: Light on the floor.
flange_strip.body: A compact arm and integrated controller footprint frees aisle space, eases redeploys on carts or tight cells, and keeps teach paths short.
flange_strip.highlight: Move it. Re-teach it. Ship it.

scroll_film.blueprint_intro_body: Envelope, joint limits, and integration callouts track the product—so mechanical and controls teams align before metal is cut.
scroll_film.application_title: Built for how you actually deploy.
scroll_film.application_body: From bench validation to steady-state production, the same control vocabulary, safety model, and teach flows travel with you—so operators learn once, then scale with confidence.

application_cards.caption: r-Lite class entry cell: light reach for bench fixtures, teaching kiosks, and quick proof runs.
r-Core integrated cobot: the balanced default for inspection, assembly, and mixed human–robot lanes.
Mid-payload line: more inertia for dispensing, machine tending, and steadier path under nominal load.
FR16-class reach: wider work envelopes for pallet-adjacent tasks without replatforming your safety story.
FR20-class arm: heavier nominal payload for end-of-line packing, CNC doors, and dense tool changers.

scroll_film.r_family_body: r-Lite through r-Max share one safety story, one tooling mindset, and one upgrade path—pick the arm that fits today’s cell, keep your integration tomorrow.
scroll_film.tail_title: Bring it to your next line—or your next lab bench.

all_cobots_specs.metaDescription: Browse every r‑Series Cobot variant matrix—r-Lite, r-Core, r-Reach, r-Max, r-Ultra—with payloads, reach, joint axes, and power in one place.

r_max.metaDescription: r‑Max Cobot line: FR16–FR20 class heavy payloads, long reach, and stamping or palletizing ready robotic arm options.

hub.metaDescription: Roooll OS, Roooll Insight, and Integrated Tools form the open Cobot robotic arm software stack for R-series automation.
hub.body: Roooll OS, cloud insight, and integration tooling for the R-series Cobot robotic arm will live here; this hub is staged early for navigation and discovery.

r_ecosystem_roooll_os.metaDescription: Roooll OS runs motion, safety, and device policies for your Cobot robotic arm fleet with deterministic scheduling.
r_ecosystem_roooll_os.body: Operating-system capabilities, APIs, and release cadence for Cobot robotic arms will be published here; placeholder page.

r_ecosystem_roooll_insight.metaDescription: Roooll Insight connects Cobot robotic arm telemetry to cloud dashboards, alerts, and fleet analytics.
r_ecosystem_roooll_insight.body: Cloud monitoring, alerting, and fleet insight for Cobot robotic arms will aggregate here; placeholder page.

r_ecosystem_integrated_tools.metaDescription: Integrated Tools bundle calibrators, simulators, and IDE plugins for Cobot robotic arm integration workflows.
r_ecosystem_integrated_tools.body: Simulation, calibration, IDE plugins, and DevOps tooling will align here; placeholder page.
